text: Iraq: The attack on Baghdad’s airport complex on Sunday followed a warning from the U.S. Embassy in Baghdad to American citizens on Saturday that they should leave Iraq immediately. The warning said “Iran and its aligned militias” were posing a “major threat to public safety in Iraq,” and came one day after the U.S. Embassy in Baghdad had been attacked for the second time in two weeks, with Kataib Hezbollah claiming responsibility. The attacks have contributed to mounting instability in the region.
title: Iran War Live Updates: ‘No Guarantees’ Oil Prices Drop Soon, U.S. Official Says
